system.description: By means of this skill, a character can throw objects to strike a specified spot with precision: tossing a weapon to the hands of a friend, pitching a ball through a hole, catching a rope with a grapnel on the ledge of a building — or to use a throwing weapon (knife, hand axe, rock, etc.). Any object that can fit in the hand and is balanced can be thrown a maximum distance in varas equal to the character's Strength; if it is bigger or unbalanced, the distance should be considerably reduced.
